channel.title: Dark Mode on Murat Kurkoglu | orioninsist
channel.description: Recent content in Dark Mode on Murat Kurkoglu | orioninsist

item.title: Taming The Glare: Force Dark Mode On All Websites In Chrome
item.author: muratkurkoglu@gmail.com (Murat Kurkoglu)
item.description: Learn the secret Chrome flag, "Auto Dark Mode for Web Contents," to force a dark theme on any website, including platforms like Google Analytics, reducing eye strain.
